data.name: Succubus: The Lustborn Curse
data.detailed_description:
Succubus: The Lustborn Curse is an 18+ 2.5D action Metroidvania where you play as Myrritha, a fallen succubus cursed after a failed attempt to seduce a priest. Stripped of her powers, she awakens in a realm of lust-driven monsters, cursed ruins, and forbidden sanctuaries.

Explore a dark anime-inspired world dripping with corruption, from dungeon depths to haunted swamps and twisted cathedrals. The mature narrative of mystery, sin, and revenge unfolds through dialogue, encounters, and explicit cutscenes.

Combat is fast, fluid, and erotic. Wield dual blades, unleash dark magic, and finish foes with devastating moves. Enemies and bosses alike push you to master both skillful hack-and-slash combat and clever use of your succubus powers.

  • Hack-and-Slash Battles – Responsive melee and ranged combat with evolving combos.

  • Boss Fights – Deadly Bossesand monstrous foes with unique styles test your reflexes and strategy.

  • Metroidvania Exploration – Unlock shortcuts, abilities, and secrets across interconnected zones.

  • Runes, Abilities & Weapons - Customize your playstyle by mixing runes, abilities, and weapons. Go fast-paced, defensive, or lean fully into lewd-focused builds, the choice is yours!

Here, lust isn’t optional, it’s essential. Erotic encounters fuel your progression, restore energy, and unlock new powers.

  • Seduction Finishers – Lewd animations drain enemies and restore HP/MP.

  • Lewd Abilities – Lust becomes a combat mechanic, not just fanservice.

  • Sacrificial Altars – Perform orgiastic rituals with captured enemies to gain buffs.

  • Uncensored Adult Content – Fully animated NSFW encounters, finishers, and cutscenes.

And that’s only the beginning, Succubus: The Lustborn Curse is packed with even more lewd mechanics to uncover.

A Dark & Sinful Story

Step into a twisted world of lust and corruption, where forbidden magic and seductive power collide.

The story unfolds as you explore, seduce, and conquer - with dialogue, encounters, and lewd cutscenes that reveal more of the succubus’s curse and the dark forces behind it.

Expect a mature narrative filled with mystery, sin, and revenge, woven seamlessly into both the combat and erotic progression

Deep Metroidvania Exploration

Traverse an interconnected world of cursed ruins, dripping swamps, and corrupted cathedrals. Discover secrets, unlock shortcuts, and return to previous zones with new abilities to uncover everything the realm hides.

A World of Sin and Power Awaits!

Succubus: The Lustborn Curse combines satisfying action with richly animated adult content in a mature, story-driven world of darkness and desire. Whether you're drawn to the combat, the corruption, or the kink, this journey offers something wickedly unforgettable.

data.short_description: A Hentai action Metroidvania where you play as a cursed succubus reclaiming her powers. Slash through enemies with fluid Hack & Slash combat, drain their essence through animated lewd abilities, and unlock new powers as you explore a dark, corrupted world of lust, and corruption.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64 bit or Later
  • 處理器: Intel i5 2300 @ 2.8GHz / AMD FX 6100 @ 3.3 GHz
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 980 / AMD R9 290X
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64 bit or Later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-2600 / AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
